title: Production lane and LLM routing refactor candidates
provisional_leader: C1: Centralize all agent LLM calls behind one invocation gateway
decision: Deepen the existing AgentRuntime/runtime-resolution/createResolvedAgentSession/CreateAiSessionFactory boundary and migrate production LLM call sites behind it before account or DSPy work.
notes: This work item now includes a self-contained ExecPlan.
The next workflow step is implement-execplan.
The selected refactor is a narrowed C1: deepen the existing runtime/session boundary instead of adding a shallow gateway.
